_comment: The intended branch protection for `main`, as a GitHub ruleset (Settings → Rules → Rulesets → New ruleset → Import a ruleset). The required-checks list is the part that drifts silently — this file makes it reviewable and restorable, and docs/CI.md explains WHY these five checks and no others. Two things the import cannot carry (account-specific ids): (1) add the release GitHub App to the ruleset's BYPASS LIST (mode: Always) after importing — release.yml's version-bump push needs it, see docs/CI.md → Release automation; (2) re-check the integration id on the CodeQL check if required-check matching complains.
name: protect main
